subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Wronged One! The world is illumined and adorned with the splendors of the Sun of Truth and the divine Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم عالم بانوار آفتاب حقیقت روشن و مزین و کتب الهی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @chastisement and requital, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
